title: Coinbase Still Willing to Work With SEC, but ‘Will Defend Itself Vigorously'
text: On Thursday, April 27th, Coinbase's CEO Brian Armstrong and CLO Paul Grewal published a video response to the SEC on the topic of its recent Wells notice warning the exchange of a possible enforcement action.

title: Coinbase Says It's Ready for Litigation With SEC, but Prefers Dialogue
text: Coinbase said it is committed to working with regulators to make the crypto industry “safe and trusted.” This statement was part of a written submission and video the crypto exchange addressed to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and shared online Thursday (April 27).

title: Coinbase Pushes Back Against Potential SEC Legal Action
text: America's largest crypto exchange claims the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is pressuring it to overhaul its entire customer-facing operation.

title: Coinbase offers a fiery response to the SEC's threat of enforcement action
text: The crypto exchange unleashed the latest salvo against the regulator in an arguably existential battle over Coinbase's business model.

title: Coinbase Armed for Legal Clash Over How Crypto Is Regulated
text: The biggest U.S. exchange said it would fight the SEC's claim that much of its business is illegal and try to convince a court that Wall Street regulators lack the authority to oversee cryptocurrency markets.

title: 'Coinbase does not list securities,' company tells U.S. regulator
text: Coinbase Global has reiterated its view to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission that it has not broken any securities laws in its formal response to a legal threat received from the regulator, the firm said on Thursday.

title: Coinbase vs. the SEC: Will their legal battle provide clarity on regulation for other crypto companies?
text: Hi everyone, welcome back to another Distributed Ledger. This is Anushree Dave, crypto reporter at MarketWatch.

title: What Is the True Value of Coinbase If It Decides to Leave the U.S.?
text: Coinbase continues to hint that it might move its crypto operations offshore if key regulatory issues are not resolved in the U.S. The company appears to be accelerating an international expansion strategy ("Go Broad, Go Deep") that has been in place since last year. Future growth at Coinbase will likely come from overseas crypto trading operations, across new markets and new products.

title: Coinbase Prime Integrates With Talos to Fuel Institutional Demand
text: Talos, a digital asset trading platform used by institutional investors, announced today it is integrating with Coinbase Prime to expand access to the crypto ecosystem for both companies' institutional clients, the company said in the press release.

title: H.C. Wainwright analyst initiates Buy rating for Coinbase (COIN)

title: COIN Stock Alert: What to Know as Coinbase Sues the SEC
text: Coinbase (NASDAQ: COIN ) stock is a hot topic on Tuesday as the crypto exchange company is suing the SEC for an answer to regulations. According to a blog post from Coinbase, it has filed a suit in federal court to force an answer from the SEC concerning crypto exchange regulation.

text: Cathie Wood bought shares of Roblox, Coinbase, and Twist Biosciences on Monday. Roblox is posting year-over-year growth, but profitability is still years away unless it can improve the monetization of its virtual realm.

title: Frustrated Coinbase sues SEC for regulatory clarity
text: The US Securities and Exchange Commission's refusal to engage with the cryptocurrency sector is causing “paralysing uncertainty in the industry” while putting companies like Coinbase at risk and causing great “potential for harm”, Coinbase lawyers told the US Court of Appeals of Monday. Coinbase's missive against the SEC calls on Gary Gensler's hawkish regulator to respond to the Nasdaq-listed cryptocurrency exchange's 2022 detailed petition asking for regulatory guidance for the nascent sector.

title: Crypto exchange Coinbase sues SEC over rulemaking petition
text: Coinbase has filed a petition to compel the U.S.

title: Coinbase asks federal court to force SEC to respond to its crypto-regulation petition
text: Popular crypto exchange Coinbase COIN late Monday asked a federal court to force the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to respond yes or no to its petition from July 2022 to make formal rules around digital-asset regulation.

title: Coinbase sues SEC after months of silence from federal regulator
text: The crypto exchange asked a judge to compel the SEC's answer on whether or not existing rulemaking processes would be extended to the crypto industry.

title: Coinbase Secures License in Bermuda for Its New Offshore Entity

title: Coinbase Announces Date of First Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: Remote-First-Company/MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Coinbase Global, Inc. (the “Company” or “Coinbase”) announced today that it will publish its first quarter 2023 shareholder letter, including financial results, on its Investor Relations website at investor.coinbase.com on Thursday, May 4, 2023, after market close. The Company will hold a question and answer session to discuss its financial results at 2:30 p.m. PT that same day. Starting on April 27 at 9:00 a.m. PT, all shareholders will be able to submit and upvote questions for Coinbase management by visiting here. This Q&A platform will remain open until 24 hours before the earnings call. Shareholders can email support@saytechnologies.com for any support inquiries. To register for the webcast, please use this link. A live webcast of the call will be available on the Investor Relations website at investor.coinbase.com. Following the call, a replay of the call, as well as a transcript, will be available on the same website. Disclosure Information Coinbase uses the investor.coinbase.com and blog.coinbase.com websites, as well as press releases, public conference calls, public webcasts, our Twitter feed (@coinbase), our Facebook page, our LinkedIn page, our YouTube channel, and Brian Armstrong’s Twitter feed (@brian_armstrong) as means of disclosing material non-public information and for complying with our disclosure obligations under Regulation FD. About Coinbase Coinbase is building the cryptoeconomy – a more fair, accessible, efficient, and transparent financial system enabled by crypto. The company started in 2012 with the radical idea that anyone, anywhere, should be able to easily and securely send and receive Bitcoin. Today, Coinbase offers a trusted and easy-to-use platform for accessing the broader cryptoeconomy.

title: Coinbase continues overseas expansion amid US regulatory pressure
text: Coinbase, the second-largest crypto exchange in the world, has received its digital asset business license from the Bermuda Monetary Authority, Bermuda Premier David Burt tweeted.

title: Coinbase granted license to operate in Bermuda, may launch derivatives exchange next week
text: (Kitco News) - Coinbase has received a license to operate a cryptocurrency exchange in Bermuda, with sources saying it could launch a derivatives exchange as soon as next week.

title: COIN Stock Alert: What to Know as Coinbase Secures Bermuda License
text: Coinbase (NASDAQ: COIN ) stock is on the move Thursday following reports that the crypto exchange has secured a license in Bermuda. That license would allow the company to set up an off-shore crypto exchange.

title: Coinbase goes offshore in latest global expansion push
text: Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ:COIN) has made a move into the offshore jurisdictions after receiving a regulatory licence to operate in Bermuda. The Nasdaq-listed cryptocurrency exchange's Class F License under the Digital Asset Business Act from the Bermuda Monetary Authority will allow the group to provide investment products outlawed in the US, such as crypto futures, perpetual swaps and other derivatives.

title: U.S. crypto exchange Coinbase secures Bermuda licence
text: Major U.S. crypto exchange Coinbase Global Inc has said it has secured a licence to operate in Bermuda, as part of a wider push to expand globally.

title: Coinbase Expects Court Battle With SEC and More Investments Overseas

title: Worried About Inflation? This Coinbase Innovation Could Be a Game Changer
text: In March, Coinbase put out a call to developers to help create a new type of cryptocurrency called a flatcoin. A flatcoin is similar to a stablecoin, except it is pegged to the rate of inflation rather than a fiat currency or commodity.

text: Coinbase stock has staged a tremendous comeback in 2023 with the stock price up more than 80% so far this year. Coinbase is exploring non-trading revenue streams, such as staking rewards, subscription fees, and institutional services, to reduce its exposure to trading revenue.
